name: Asheboro Recreation Center
description: Asheboro Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Asheboro, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Creekside Park
description: Creekside Park is a place to play pickleball in Archdale, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Grubb Family YMCA
description: Grubb Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Archdale, NC. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
